markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to explore a content partnership between Tines and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Tines has virtually no organic pipeline, as its lean content team cannot produce the volume of SEO-focused content needed to compete with rivals like NAN.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX offers a scalable AI-driven service to publish 5 articles/week, using its proprietary platform and expert team (e.g., ex-TechCrunch EIC) to build SEO/GEO authority.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - **Proof:** Case studies show strong results, including a 3x traffic increase for Augment Code (enabling them to cut paid spend) and a \#2 Google ranking for a competitive term.
  - [**Path Forward:** Tines will evaluate GrowthX's 8-week, low-lift Phase 1 strategy sprint in a follow-up demo scheduled for Jan 8 at 11:30 AM EST.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Tines' Organic Content Gap

  - [**Goal:** Scale organic growth by fixing foundational SEO issues and addressing content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**Current State:**](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Organic pipeline is "basically nothing."](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [Lean content team produces near-zero SEO-focused articles.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [No set content schedule; relies on ad-hoc freelancers.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**Strategic Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Past Success:** Mark and Stephen previously built an organic engine that generated \~33% of opportunities at LearnUpon.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [**Competitive Pressure:** Rivals like NAN are capturing search demand by ranking for problem-based queries (e.g., "how to automate this task").](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**Future-Proofing:** Content is essential for competing in the evolving AI search landscape (GEO).](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### The Solution: GrowthX's AI-Driven Content Engine

  - [**Service Model:** An end-to-end partnership for strategy, execution, and monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**Volume:** Publishes 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**Platform:** Uses proprietary AI workflows for deep research and content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Team:** Blends AI with human expertise (e.g., Chief Content Officer is ex-TechCrunch EIC).](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [**Phased Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8 weeks):** A strategy sprint to build foundational artifacts (personas, style guides) and publish 5–10 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Ongoing):** The full 5 articles/week production cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [**Client Lift:** Minimal. Tines' role is primarily reviewing drafts and providing CMS access for staging.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### Proof: Case Studies & Results

  - [**Augment Code:**](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Competing in the crowded AI coding space (vs. GitHub, Cursor).](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [**Results:** 3x monthly organic traffic (20k → 60k), enabling them to cut paid spend.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - **Impact:** Achieved \#2 Google rank for a competitive term and secured multiple citations in AI search results.
  - [**Ramp:**](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [**Project:** Programmatically created 500+ pages for a vendor directory using Ramp's internal spend data.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Established Ramp as an authority on B2B tool reviews and costs.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

### Strategy: Balancing Foundational & Topical Content

  - [**Tines' Need:** A strategy that balances building foundational content with reacting to new, trending topics.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [**Foundational:** Uses a keyword-driven AirTable backlog to build topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
      - [**Topical:** The backlog is flexible, allowing Tines to easily insert new assignments for trending topics.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [**Structure:** GrowthX provides guidance on blog structure and internal linking to maximize SEO impact.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Send follow-up email with materials and calendar invite.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [**All:** Attend follow-up demo on **Jan 8 at 11:30 AM EST** to review the GrowthX platform.](https://fathom.video/share/TpdgDA9GNwWysqJqGrtdGbD4tydPdu-S?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
